label: CM-2(2)
title: Automation Support for Accuracy and Currency

prose.en: Maintain the currency, completeness, accuracy, and availability of the baseline configuration of the system using {param:cm-02.02_odp}.

guidance.en: Automated mechanisms that help organizations maintain consistent baseline configurations for systems include configuration management tools, hardware, software, firmware inventory tools, and network management tools. Automated tools can be used at the organization level, mission and business process level, or system level on workstations, servers, notebook computers, network components, or mobile devices. Tools can be used to track version numbers on operating systems, applications, types of software installed, and current patch levels. Automation support for accuracy and currency can be satisfied by the implementation of CM-8(2) for organizations that combine system component inventory and baseline configuration activities.

prose.en: the currency of the baseline configuration of the system is maintained using {param:cm-02.02_odp};
the completeness of the baseline configuration of the system is maintained using {param:cm-02.02_odp};
the accuracy of the baseline configuration of the system is maintained using {param:cm-02.02_odp};
the availability of the baseline configuration of the system is maintained using {param:cm-02.02_odp}.

objects.en: procedures addressing the baseline configuration of the system
system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with configuration management responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Organizational processes for managing baseline configurations
automated mechanisms implementing baseline configuration maintenance

guidelines.en: automated mechanisms for maintaining baseline configuration of the system are defined;
